_comment: Machine-readable record of the manifest version and date at which each clinical safety document was last formally reviewed and signed off by the Clinical Safety Officer (CSO). Update this file — not check-doc-versions.js — whenever a CSO review is completed. The check script reads these entries to compute 'minor releases behind' and escalate accordingly.

incremental_reviews.scope: Clinical-matching changes only (single ACB scorer, STOPP NSAID/aspirin term parity, completeness + contract-test CI). Keeper-prepared; CSO sign-off by merge.

docs.notes: Last FULL CSO clinical-hazard re-baseline at 3.64.0 (Dr Dave Triska, 2026-06-13). last_cso_review_version is deliberately left at 3.64.0 so the doc-version gate keeps surfacing the outstanding backlog. A full review must still fold in the v3.91.2 attribute-injection-XSS remediation, the PDF.js 4.x upgrade, and all intervening clinical-chip changes from 3.65 to 3.113. The v3.114.0 clinical-matching changes were reviewed and documented incrementally on 2026-06-17 (see HAZARD-LOG H-031 / H-006 / H-016 and CSN limitation 13).

incremental_reviews.scope: Added H-031 (cross-surface clinical-score divergence, closed by the single ACB scorer); updated H-016 and H-006 controls for the STOPP term parity, single scorer, completeness CI and producer->consumer contract tests. Full Keeper currency sweep of all 6 rule domains run; no rule-file change applied (WebFetch 403 — source pages unverifiable; findings WebSearch-corroborated only).

docs.notes: Hazard Log v3.10. Last FULL CSO clinical-hazard re-baseline at 3.64.0 (Dr Dave Triska, 2026-06-13). last_cso_review_version deliberately left at 3.64.0 so the gate keeps flagging the backlog. A full review must still assess hazards introduced from 3.65 to 3.113 and cover the XSS and PDF.js vectors. The v3.114.0 clinical-matching delta was reviewed and hazard-assessed incrementally on 2026-06-17 (H-031 + H-006/H-016 control updates).
SOUP v1.8. Reviewed and reissued at 3.113.0 on 2026-06-16.
